## Purpose

Primary UI/UX Pro Max design intelligence skill for planning, building, reviewing, fixing, and improving UI/UX work across web and mobile stacks. The upstream folder contains the main skill instructions plus supporting data and scripts for style, product, color, typography, UX, chart, and stack-specific guidance.

## Terranex usage

Use this upstream reference through the Terranex adapter skill at `.ai/skills/terranex-ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md`. Do not use it directly to override Terranex product constraints, Arabic-first requirements, RTL behavior, financial auditability, or runtime boundaries.

## Runtime boundary

This folder is reference material only. Do not import it into React runtime code or package it into the app bundle.
